message:
feat(dashboard): async loading with spinner for detail views

Detail views (CPU, Memory, Network, Disk) now show a loading spinner
while fetching metrics data. The data is fetched asynchronously so
the UI remains responsive during the request.

Also added more detailed info in each detail view:
- Memory: shows active, buffers/cached, swap details
- Network: shows all interfaces with up/down rates
- Disk: shows filesystem type for each mount
